---
title: "Materiales"
format:
  html:
    theme: styles.scss
---


::: card-outline
## Positron == 💖

<iframe src="https://hacerpptesmipasion.netlify.app/" width="100%" height="400px" style="border: none; border-radius: 12px;"></iframe>

<div class="center-text" style="margin-top: 1em;">
[🌐 Ver en pestaña nueva](https://hacerpptesmipasion.netlify.app/){.btn .bg-pink .text-white target="_blank"}
</div>
:::
